_README: Stream Slate — game list. Edit this file and push to update the calendar. date: "YYYY-MM-DD" (day), "YYYY-MM" (month), "YYYY-Q3"/"Holiday 2026"/"Spring 2027" (quarter), "YYYY" (year -> rail), "TBD" (rail). dateLabel: optional display override. kind: game|replay|dlc|event. event uses endDate for its window. basis: self|remake-original|series-avg|estimate.

games.title: DK Challenge
games.hltbNote: Fixed personal stream-challenge window, not an HLTB playthrough.
games.notes: Self-set challenge running through the summer.

games.title: Xenoblade Chronicles 1 — S2
games.hltbNote: Xenoblade Chronicles: Definitive Edition main story.
games.notes: Stream "Season 2" replay of XC1.

games.title: Deltarune — Chapter 5
games.hltbNote: Avg of Deltarune Chapters 1–4 (~3–4h each).
games.notes: Free chapter update for existing owners.

games.title: Star Fox (Switch 2)
games.hltbNote: Based on Star Fox 64 main (~5h) + new prologue.
games.notes: Velan Studios remake of Star Fox 64 with mouse aiming + online dogfights.

games.title: Rhythm Heaven Groove
games.hltbNote: Based on Rhythm Heaven Megamix completion (~10–12h).
games.notes: First new Rhythm Heaven in over a decade.

games.title: Splatoon Raiders
games.hltbNote: Est. from Splatoon single-player campaigns (~8h) scaled up for a full spin-off.
games.notes: Single-player-focused spin-off; up to 4-player co-op raids.

games.title: Halo: Campaign Evolved
games.hltbNote: Based on Halo: Combat Evolved campaign (~10h) + added content.
games.earlyAccess: Premium & Collector’s get up to 5 days early access (from Jul 23) + Alpha Halo Armory Pack.
games.notes: Day one on Game Pass. Collector’s adds a 12" Master Chief statue, LED Cortana chip, Steelbook.

games.title: Xenoblade Chronicles 2 — S2
games.hltbNote: Xenoblade Chronicles 2 main story.
games.notes: Stream "Season 2" replay of XC2.

games.title: Pokémon Pokopia — DLC
games.hltbNote: Estimate for a sizeable Pokémon DLC.
games.notes: Date per your note (August); some reports peg the DLC to Q1 2027 — verify.

games.title: Final Fantasy XIV
games.hltbNote: MMO — no fixed length; estimate covers a content patch/return arc.
games.notes: Live-service MMO; "finish" is open-ended — adjust hours to the content you plan to stream.

games.title: Orbitals
games.hltbNote: New IP — rough estimate for a co-op adventure.
games.earlyAccess: Deluxe Edition adds extra in-game content.
games.notes: Two-player co-op sci-fi adventure (anime aesthetic).

games.title: Marvel's Wolverine
games.hltbNote: Based on Insomniac's Marvel's Spider-Man games (~17h main).
games.earlyAccess: Pre-order: Classic Brown suit + Reflective Claws (early unlock), 1 Technique Point, 4 avatars.
games.notes: PS5 exclusive, Insomniac Games.

games.title: Fire Emblem: Fortune's Weave
games.hltbNote: Between Engage (~35h) and Three Houses (~50h/route).
games.notes: Switch 2 exclusive. Pre-orders opened Jun 9, 2026.

games.title: Kingdom Hearts Collection [I–III]
games.hltbNote: Headline trilogy main stories combined (KH1 ~25h, KH2 ~33h, KH3 ~30h); full set incl. 2.8 is longer.
games.notes: Includes HD 1.5+2.5 ReMIX, 2.8 Final Chapter Prologue, KH3 + ReMind. First native on Nintendo.

games.title: Grand Theft Auto VI
games.hltbNote: Estimate from GTA V story (~31h), scaled up.
games.notes: Editions/pricing not fully confirmed; Take-Two signalled $70–80 standard.

games.title: Xenoblade Chronicles 3 — S2
games.hltbNote: Xenoblade Chronicles 3 main story.
games.notes: Stream "Season 2" replay of XC3.

games.title: Zelda: Ocarina of Time (remake)
games.hltbNote: Based on Ocarina of Time main (~27h).
games.notes: Announced for later 2026, no firm date yet.

games.title: The Wolf Among Us (Remastered)
games.hltbNote: Based on the original The Wolf Among Us (~8h).
games.notes: Remaster with 1h+ bonus content. Holiday 2026 window.

games.title: Among Us Story: On Guard
games.hltbNote: Estimate for a standalone narrative experience.
games.notes: Standalone narrative spin-off; no firm date.

games.title: The Duskbloods
games.hltbNote: FromSoftware multiplayer — no campaign length; rough estimate.
games.notes: FromSoftware Switch 2 exclusive, up to 8 players PvPvE. No date.

games.title: Stranger Than Heaven
games.hltbNote: Based on RGG / Like a Dragon main stories (~35–45h).
games.notes: RGG Studio (Project Century). Day one on Game Pass.

games.title: Tomb Raider: Legacy of Atlantis
games.hltbNote: Based on the original Tomb Raider (1996) (~12h).
games.notes: Unreal Engine 5 full remake of Tomb Raider (1996) by Crystal Dynamics.

games.title: Persona 4 Revival
games.hltbNote: Based on Persona 4 Golden main (~55h).
games.notes: Eight editions; physical PS5 only. Day one on Game Pass.

games.title: Final Fantasy VII Revelation
games.hltbNote: Estimate from FF7 Remake (~33h) & Rebirth (~73h) main stories.
games.notes: Final part of the FF7 remake trilogy, simultaneous all-platform.

games.title: Pokémon Winds and Waves
games.hltbNote: Estimate from recent mainline Pokémon (~30h main).
games.notes: Gen 10. Official window is "2027"; you noted November.

games.title: Pikuniku 2
games.hltbNote: Based on Pikuniku (~3–4h), now 3D.
games.notes: Devolver Digital; quirky exploration sequel in 3D.

games.title: Xenoblade Genesis
games.hltbNote: Estimate from prior Xenoblade main stories (~55–62h).
games.notes: New Monolith Soft Xenoblade entry; school-setting vibe.

games.title: Kingdom Hearts IV
games.hltbNote: Estimate from Kingdom Hearts III (~30h main).
games.notes: No firm date; reported coming to Switch 2 (possibly at the Oct 8 launch).

games.title: Final Fantasy VII Remake / Rebirth / Reunion
games.hltbNote: Remake (~33h) + Rebirth (~73h) + Crisis Core Reunion (~14h).
games.notes: Replay/backlog of the existing FF7 titles (Rebirth now on Switch 2).

games.title: Virtua Fighter Crossroads
games.hltbNote: Estimate for a fighting game with a single-player campaign.
games.notes: Anthology blending a narrative campaign with fighting (UE5).
